title: Outlook calendar events filter
excerpt: Hi, is there a possibility that not all events from the outlook calendar go to the table on monday, is there way to send a reminder at a time of meeting to person ??

posts.author: Deathy (Michał )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there a possibility that not all events from the outlook calendar go to the table on monday, is there way to send a reminder at a time of meeting to person ??

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Yes, there is a possibility that not all events from the Outlook calendar go to the table on Monday.
This could happen due to various reasons, such as conflicting schedules, different time zones, or certain events being marked as private or not being categorized properly.

Regarding sending a reminder at the time of the meeting to a person, Outlook has built-in features such as Attendee Notifications, Reminder Settings which can enhance the chances of all relevant events showing up on Monday and ensure attendees receive timely reminders for their meetings.

Hope its helpful to u.
